TESTPIPE_101 — Week 1

Week 1 — Summary

Learning Objectives

  • Describe photosynthesis as a light-driven conversion of CO2 and water into glucose and oxygen.
  • Differentiate the light-dependent reactions from the Calvin cycle.
  • Identify common misconceptions about photosynthesis and explain the correct science.

Key Takeaways

Photosynthesis stores light energy as glucose in two coupled stages: the light-dependent reactions and the Calvin cycle.
